title: astragalus ictericus
intro: Astragalus ictericus, also known as yellow milk vetch, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus ictericus include improving immune function, reducing stress and fatigue, and protecting against oxidative stress and cell damage. Astragalus ictericus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried extract, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
